subject: Status review: labrador milestone in Auckland | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-2369
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of labrador work in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Frida Kahlo as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-2369. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: readiness, handoff.
